name: Old Remembrance Joint Armory
desc: Command center of the Old Remembrance Joint Armory: officers, archivists, and holdout crews who reject crystal assimilation and coordinate defense against every outside claimant.

name: FSD Relief Charter
desc: A public Farsight relief office built around triage routes, screened logistics, and a carefully limited FSD storefront. Its sterile clinic-white halls are welcoming in the way a clean wound is welcoming: useful, quiet, and watched from every crystal-lit corner.

name: Reflecting-Light Liaison Spire
tags: FSD_charter, FSD_liaison_spire, unraidable, tactical_bombardment, structure, codex_unlockable
desc: An upgraded Farsight liaison compound where relief dispatch, crystal-comms, and sealed procurement meet inside one pale diplomatic tower. The public desks remain at the base; the important conversations happen higher up, behind glass that reflects requests before anyone speaks.
